results.definition_en: The joint in the middle of the leg, where it bends.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 膝蓋;腿部中段可彎曲的關節。
results.example_en: She had a small cut on her knee.

results.definition_en: A tool with a blade, used to cut things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 刀;附刀刃、用以切割之工具。
results.example_en: Use a sharp knife to cut the bread.

results.definition_en: A round tight place made by tying threads or rope.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 結;以線或繩綁成的緊結。
results.example_en: Make a knot in the rope.

results.definition_en: A flat green part that grows on a plant or tree.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 葉子、樹葉;植物或樹上生長的扁平綠色部分。
results.example_en: A red leaf fell from the tree.

results.definition_en: One of the parts of the body used for standing and walking.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 腿;用以站立與行走的身體部位。
results.example_en: He hurt his leg in the fall.

results.definition_en: A building or room with many books that people may take to read.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 圖書館;藏有眾多書籍、可借閱之處。
results.example_en: I go to the library every week.

results.definition_en: A long thin mark on a surface; or a row of things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 線;表面上的長細痕，或物之排列。
results.example_en: Draw a straight line on the paper.

results.definition_en: One of the two soft red parts of the mouth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 嘴唇;嘴部柔軟的兩片紅色部分。
results.example_en: She bit her lip in fear.

results.definition_en: A thing put on a door or box to keep it shut.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鎖;安於門或箱上、使其閉合之物。
results.example_en: Put a strong lock on the door.
results.example_zh_tw: 在門上裝一把堅固的鎖。

results.definition_en: A flat picture of a place that shows where things are.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 地圖;某地的扁平圖示，表明事物所在。
results.example_en: Look at the map to find the city.

results.definition_en: A small thin stick that gives a small flame when rubbed.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 火柴;摩擦即燃的細小木棒。
results.example_en: Strike a match to light the candle.

results.definition_en: A long-tailed animal with hands, that lives in trees.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 猴子;長尾、有手、生活於樹上的動物。
results.example_en: A monkey ate the banana.
results.example_zh_tw: 一隻猴子吃了那根香蕉。

results.definition_en: The big round thing in the sky at night that gives soft light.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 月亮;夜空中發出柔光的圓形天體。
results.example_en: The moon is bright tonight.

results.definition_en: The opening in the face used for eating and talking.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 嘴、口;用以進食與說話的臉部開口。
results.example_en: Open your mouth wide for me.

results.definition_en: The part of the body that pulls to make bones move.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 肌肉;牽動骨骼運動的身體組織。
results.example_en: He has strong muscles in his arms.

results.definition_en: A thin sharp piece of metal, hit into wood to keep two things together; or the hard part at the end of a finger.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 釘子;或指甲。
results.example_en: Hit the nail into the board.

results.definition_en: The part of the body between the head and the shoulders.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 脖子、頸部;介於頭與肩之間的身體部位。
results.example_en: She has a long, soft scarf round her neck.
results.example_zh_tw: 她脖子上圍著一條長軟圍巾。

results.definition_en: A thin sharp piece of metal with a hole at one end, used for sewing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 針;細而尖、末端有孔、用於縫紉的金屬物。
results.example_en: Put the thread through the needle.

results.definition_en: One of the thin lines in the body that send feeling to the brain.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 神經;體內向大腦傳送感覺的細索。
results.example_en: The nerve in her arm was hurt.

results.definition_en: A material made of cord or thread, with open spaces, used to catch fish or other things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 網;以繩或線製、有空隙的網狀物，用以捕物。
results.example_en: The fish was caught in the net.

results.definition_en: The part of the face used for breathing and smelling.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鼻子;用以呼吸與嗅聞的臉部器官。
results.example_en: He has a long, thin nose.
results.example_zh_tw: 他有一個又長又挺的鼻子。

results.definition_en: A hard fruit, with a soft food inside that one can eat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 堅果;外殼堅硬、內有可食物之果實。
results.example_en: Crack the nut and eat the inside.

results.definition_en: A room or building where people do work, like a business.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 辦公室;商務工作所進行的房間或大樓。
results.example_en: I work in a small office in town.
results.example_zh_tw: 我在鎮上一間小辦公室上班。

results.definition_en: A round, sweet fruit with a thick skin, often eaten.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 柳橙;圓形味甜、果皮厚的常見水果。
results.example_en: I have an orange for breakfast.

results.definition_en: A closed box used to cook food with heat inside.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 烤箱;以內熱烹煮食物的密閉箱體。
results.example_en: Put the cake in the hot oven.
